programme.title: Wild for the Night
programme.desc: When an ex-convict returns home to solve his sister's murder, the authority forces him to go undercover to help them bust illegal activities at a night club.

programme.title: Lost River
programme.desc: Billy, a struggling single mother, gets pulled into a dangerous underworld while her son discovers a hidden underwater town.

programme.title: The Pianist
programme.desc: A Jewish musician's privileged lifestyle comes to an end with the Nazi invasion of Germany, following which he must endure the horrors of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Serena
programme.desc: In Depression-era North Carolina, the future of George Pemberton's timber empire becomes complicated when he marries Serena.

programme.title: Stand Up Guys
programme.desc: A geriatric gangster's release from prison leads to a reunion with his two partners in crime, one of whom has orders to kill him.

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: A young boxer wins his debut championship and goes on to reach new heights of fame through his refusal to fight in Vietnam and other controversial actions.

programme.title: Silver Linings Playbook
programme.desc: After spending eight months in a mental institution, a man tries to start a new life.

programme.title: Revolutionary Road
programme.desc: A near-perfect couple decides to transfer to Paris in order to escape their satiated lives. But their relationship starts to strain when the woman's pregnancy forces them to change their plan.

programme.title: Texas Killing Fields
programme.desc: In a small town in Texas, a homicide detective and his partner embark on a challenging mission to arrest a vicious serial killer.

programme.desc: In the madrassahs and minarets of Bukhara, Alex Outhwaite finds parts of Central Asia that have remained nearly unchanged for centuries.

programme.title: The Ballad of Fes
programme.desc: The imperial city of Fes, with its richly evocative attractions, makes Rafe feel like he is in a movie...with a plot twist right around the corner.

programme.title: Jeju Island
programme.desc: From a volcano rising out of the sea to a village of tough old female divers, Andrew Maciver explores everything that is unique about Jeju island.

programme.title: Singapore
programme.desc: With just 48 hours on hand, London-based adventurer, Natalie Gayle has set out to explore the true character of the Lion City: Singapore.

programme.title: Labuan Bajo & Bali, Indonesia
programme.desc: Hannah Jackson explores the scenery, culture and flavours on the islands of Komodo National Park. She also visits the Taman Ayun temple in Bali.

programme.title: Indian
programme.desc: From fish head curry to ‘Rojak’, why do visitors from India in Singapore find it difficult to identify with the Indian dishes in the country?

programme.title: Singapore
programme.desc: With just 48 hours on hand, London-based adventurer, Natalie Gayle has set out to explore the true character of the Lion City: Singapore.

programme.title: One Flew Over Casablanca
programme.desc: At Casablanca, Rafe draws hilarious connections between what he sees, and the 1942 Hollywood classic named after the city.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As the SVU detectives investigate the alleged rape of a sorority pledge, drunken students and conflicting accounts complicate matters.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a concert turns into a mob scene, a teenager is brutally assaulted; Detective Amaro ends up defending the prime suspect's reputation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When two sniper attacks on the NYPD link to Detective Tutuola's past as a narcotics officer, he reconnects with his former partner in hope of finding a motive; Lt. Alexandra Eames helps SVU investigate.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The investigation into how a comatose woman ended up in a river near the mayor's home reveals the victim's unexpected wild side.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a young boy is abandoned, the squad discovers more victims waiting to be rescued.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: As a series of rapes on the Upper West Side puts the city on edge, a celebrity chef (Cybill Shepherd) fears she is the next victim when someone follows her home; Detective Benson has a hard time overcoming her traumatic ordeal.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a rape victim is arrested for murder in Suffolk County, Detective Benson questions the case and finds enough evidence for District Attorney Barba to charge a different suspect in Manhattan.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives go under cover to arrest a man who brutally attacks other men; a deceptively tough defense attorney (Nia Vardalos) complicates ADA Barba's case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: FBI Agent Dana Lewis partners with SVU when she thinks a 25-year-old rape-murder case in New York is connected to multiple unsolved cases across the country; as Lewis doggedly pursues her suspect, Benson and Amaro question his guilt.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The SVU squad tries to keep Detective Rollins' sister safe from her abusive boyfriend when she turns up beaten and pregnant; when Rollins is forced to take drastic action, an internal affairs investigation begins.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Capt. Cragen search for suspects after a missing infant is discovered badly beaten in the bushes at a local park.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A standoff in a motel on the Jersey Shore incites a pedophile to take detective Benson hostage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the rape and murder of two Arab-American women who were trying to improve relations among different groups.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives probe what looks like the ritualistic sacrifice of a 7-year-old Nigerian boy and uncover a slave-smuggling ring.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Family members become murder suspects when DNA tests on the body of a 16-year-old girl reveal evidence of incest.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives interview an overprotective woman (Diane Verona) to find out why her son is scavenging for food in the garbage; the boy later is later found dead and his older brother confesses to killing him.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After finding out a dead teenage girl was a bully, detectives look for murder suspects at her school.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A child dies in the emergency room after passing out during a prayer vigil at a late-night church service.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The search for the sexual abuser of a child leads the detectives to a wealthy toy mogul known for his generous hospitality toward children.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman claiming to have been the victim of rape commits suicide while she is still in the emergency room.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The death of a wealthy senior citizen leads to an investigations that uncovers a serial killer who targets the elderly.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate when a baby is left abandoned with a note indicating the mother's kidnapping and quickly learn that she has been kidnapped by a copycat serial killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a wealthy couple laundering money for South American drug dealers is murdered, former ADA Alexandra Cabot (Stephanie March) returns from witness protection to help solve the case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a teenage girl disappears, a psychic (guest star Martin Short) is brought into the investigation.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler goes under cover as a sex offender to gain the trust of a serial rapist released from jail, but his cover is blown, putting his life in danger.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate a school shooting that left three students dead and link the rifle used in the killings to a gun store serving as the headquarters of a white supremacist group.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detective Stabler and CSU technician Millie Vizcarrondo (Paula Garcés) investigate a child's remains found at a construction site and find they belong to one of five boys reported missing 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a series of rapes is linked to a speed-dating service, Benson goes undercover and discovers Mike Jergens (Dean Cain) is the assailant.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investigation into the near-fatal beating of a 12-year-old boy uncovers a female suspect whose trial becomes about the rights of same-sex parents.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When the accused killer of a teen's mother is released due to lack of evidence, the youth exacts his own justice by killing the man.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When an 8-year-old girl is kidnapped on her way home from school, DNA tests on the blood found in the abductor's abandoned van reveal she has leukemia.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the rape and murder of two Arab-American women who were trying to improve relations among different groups.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Motivational speaker Rebecca Musser talks about her life in The Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints and what made her leave the denomination.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: When a U.S. senatorial candidate's staffer is run over and killed while crossing the street, the team must determine if it was an accident or a murder than could put others in danger.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A CIA agent who once worked with Sam seeks his help before dying of an apparent suicide; while working under cover, Deeks and Kensi enter a prized poodle in a dog show.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A CIA agent's death leads the team to a group of dangerous Russian agents; Hanna worries a secret will be exposed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a Chinese woman's daughter is held for ransom by smugglers, the detectives turn to her sister for help.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The son of an outspoken critic becomes the prime suspect when the star of a controversial teen show is raped in her trailer on the set.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a man whose 12-year-old wife is hospitalized with pregnancy complications, and they learn that he is the leader of a cult.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A professor (Billy Campbell) accused of sexual assault volunteers to submit a DNA sample for testing, but the case turns into a he-said, she-said standoff.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After recovering from being shot during a robbery, Fin returns to the narcotics division to keep a promise he made to locate a missing person.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A gang member is pushed from a rooftop in what appears to be retribution for a sexual assault, but when the assault victim also turns up dead, the detectives realize the case is far more complicated.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A tip leads Benson and Cragen to the body of a 7-year-old boy, missing since 1980, and the detectives think the new information was a ploy to help the suspected killer, on death row for another murder, delay his execution.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Fin investigate the brutal rape and murder of a prostitute, and the prime suspects turn out to be a group of teens suspected of re-enacting a favorite video game.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives discover that a murdered teenage girl was a prostitute and had contracted HIV while working on a pornographic film, which leads them to her killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler struggles to keep his emotions in check as he interrogates a man (Matthew Modine) suspected in the murder of a teenage girl -- a man he once let get away on similar charges.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A mother who reported the statutory rape of her daughter is found murdered.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: When a baby boy is discovered in the trash, Benson and Stabler use a bar T-shirt found at the scene to link the crime to a well-to-do college student.

She is willing to sacrifice everything to protect the good name of the family that raised her. programme.title: CINTA TANPA KARENA EPS 388-389
programme.desc: couple of lovers who are prevented from being together by their parents' approval. They are Dipta (Megantara) and Nuna (Ochi Rosdiana), and they must maintain their love in secret. Due to Nuna's mother's blockade, their love tale must overcome numerous challenges.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 42

Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: MENCINTAI IPAR SENDIRI EPS 53
programme.desc: Ayuna, a beauty vlogger and model, finishes a shoot and is picked up by her younger sister, Bella. Bella takes Ayuna to a workshop to give her a surprise: Ayuna's sports car has been upgraded as a gift, since Bella is getting married before her older sister. Bella then asks Ayuna to have one last race on a deserted road as her farewell to the racing world, a request that Ayuna agrees to with a hea

programme.title: AIRA EPS 15
programme.desc: Aira was at the peak of happiness as she prepared to welcome her wedding day with her beloved, Adrian. However, one day before the big day, a request from her superior, Haris, forced her to return to the office to send a forgotten email. That decision became the starting point of a tragedy that changed Aira's life forever.

programme.title: SEINDAH CINTA MUTIARA 27
programme.desc: It tells the story of Mutiara, who must struggle hard in order to live a decent life. However, problems keep coming one after another, forcing Mutiara to become even stronger to survive them. There are even people around her who are always cruel and hateful toward her. Fortunately, there is Diandra, a friend who never stops supporting Mutiara and encouraging her to keep going.

programme.title: RAHASIA DAN CINTA 4
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent business tycoon, is arranged to marry Greg. The two are brought together because their fathers want to merge their companies. Dwita's father knows that she will most likely reject this plan. Therefore, he provides her with a new facility—a bodyguard named Debu. Thus begins the journey of Dwita, Greg, and Debu, as various problems start to arise in Dwita's life.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. programme.title: Legend of the Magnate
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. programme.title: No Return
programme.desc: Shap-chat agrees to Kwai-sim’s request for him to work at the bank. He also promises to write a report. Kwai-sim hastily promises to teach Fong Yee and her chums a lesson.

programme.title: Framed

programme.title: Raya Sebagai Isteri

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
